exercises.name: Bent-Over Barbell Row
exercises.notes: Holding at 50kg — no logged sets yet. Overhand grip, hinge to ~45°, pull bar to lower chest. Brace hard.

exercises.name: Single Arm DB Row
exercises.notes: Holding at 20kg. Brace on bench, drive elbow up and back. Full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Holding at 50kg. Neutral or underhand grip today. Pull to upper chest, control the ascent.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.notes: Holding at 10kg. Cables crossed, pull back and out. Squeeze rear delts hard at end range.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.notes: Holding at 11kg. Arm hangs at full stretch on incline bench. The stretch is the point — don't rush the bottom.
